education.institution: Faculdade de Informática e Administração Paulista

highlights: Startup focused on Conversational Interfaces powered by Artificial Intelligence.
Chatbots for online businesses, with the goal of improving their customers experience.
Implement processes, manage and provide technical support and leadership to the Engineering team.
Work together with the Sales team visiting potential clients. Responsible for technical questions, gathering requested features and insights.
Work together with the Product team to define and plan the roadmap for medium and long term goals.
Biggest e-commerce of pet supplies in Brazil.
Architect and lead the development of the prime membership project which turned to achieve 30% of the monthly revenue and increased the repurchase rate per year by 500%.

Responsible for understanding and mapping all the company internal processes related to the ERP system. This effort's goal was to upgrade it in order to be able to create multiple WMS, allowing the company to expand their market to other country states. Lead all the technical details involved.
Technical leadership and management of the Business Intelligence team. Responsible for research and adoption of cutting edge technologies related to big data.

Lead the definition and creation of an internal supply chain project. Working together with the procurement department in order to automate, manage and optimize the inventory and automate the purchases from suppliers.
Digital marketing and performance industry, medium sized.
Work together with Sales and Product teams to turn ideas into software solutions.
Lead the Facebook Marketing Partner membership, working closely with the Facebook Engineering team to architech and deliver digital marketing solutions to big companies.
Lead the Google Partner membership, cooperating with Google Engineers to architect and deliver Google Adwords and Google Shopping automation solutions.
Started experiencing with Data Science: data mining, analysis and presentation, Machine Learning.
Culture and entertainment industry, big sized.
Development and support internal and external legacy projects.
Development of a project called Veja SP, an huge catalog and guide for restaurants, nightlife, cinema, etc.
Development of a big internal project for content and assets management through the whole company.
Started experiencing with teams technical leadership and agile methodologies.
Financial Services industry, big sized. Widely known and most respected Brazilian name in credit and finance risk analysis.
Definition and evangelization of architectural patterns, integrations and development processes. Look after internal and external legacy projects.
Provide technical leadership and support to the development teams.
Financial Services industry, big sized.
Lead the Brazilian offshore teams working on a huge project called Systems Refresh.
Work closely with mainframe developers in order to understand legacy business logic and rewrite it using recent technologies.
Strong experience with distributed applications, data warehousing,  business process modeling, transactions and security.
Toyota do Brasil    - 2003 | 2005
Wdotnet Internet    - 1999 | 2003
Flyever Electronics - 1996 | 1999
